name: Caramel Apple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl until well blended.
2. Add eggs to the mixture; continue mixing until everything is combined.
3. Stir in apple juice concentrate to taste.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared Graham cracker pie crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until the center is almost set.
6. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely.
7. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours, preferably overnight.
8. Before serving, drizzle with caramel topping and sprinkle with chopped peanuts.
9. Garnish with slices of apple on top.
